runners.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 19.57 in a 1.3 lengths win at this track over 340m. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 19.57 in a 1.3 lengths win at this track over 340m. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels and lost ground entering the first turn.
Tightened for room and lost ground entering the turn out of the back straight.

runners.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 340m at this track by 0.8 lengths in a Free For All. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 340m at this track by 0.8 lengths in a Free For All. Can make it back to back wins.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together rounding the turn into the front straight.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 9 lengths at Maitland. Form solid prior to that including a win at Maitland three back. Looks a key chance here on best and given another chance.

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (20.09) over 340m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

runners.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Free For All at this track when a one length third but did run a fast 19.66 over the 340m trip. Looks an each way chance again here.
